name: Impossible Turkey Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Turkey or chicken, cooked and cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate lightly.
3. In the pie plate, sprinkle the turkey, mushrooms, onions, salt, and cheese evenly.
4. Beat the remaining ingredients together until smooth in a blender on high speed.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake until golden brown and a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean, 30-35 minutes.
7. Allow to stand for 5 minutes before cutting.
8. Refrigerate any remaining pie.
9. Makes 6-8 servings. You can substitute smoked cooked ham for the turkey.
10. HIGH ALT: Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
